implemented_this_release: Preserved the resolved v0.25.2 mobile workout-save path

Consolidated health subdomains under Health and added Discover/Documents navigation
Unified sleep wake-date fields and Recent Health Record visibility with selector-based entry
Implemented activity-relevant Fitness fields, Favorites default, focused detail, and reversible removal
Added explicit medication dose confirmation and reviewed batch backfill
Added provider-backed goals with optional advisory AI review
Moved user profile to provider-backed preferences with legacy migration
Added Dashboard pinning/order, global search, concrete evidence detail, and modal-entry protection

Deterministic medication, sleep, workbook, provenance, and workflow regressions
known_issues: Physical-device, live storage, live AI, protected workbook, service-worker, and accessibility behavior require environment verification

Central shared AI and multi-account isolation require protected backend infrastructure
